page_title: Evangelion ANIMA Ikuto Yamashita Art Book
text:
is an artbook published on 19 February 2025 by Kadokawa. It focus on the world and mecha from Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA. 

Overview

It is packed with illustrations that will make fans drool, such as color illustrations from the TV anime Neon Genesis Evangelion. Color illustrations from Iconic Field, which Yamashita was announced as director at the Japan Animator Expo. There is also color illustrations and settei drawings from Evangelion ANIMA, an original story that depicts three years after the final episode of the TV anime!

In addition, the exclusive interview, which can only be told now that the TV anime Neon Genesis Evangelion has been broadcast for 30 years, such as "How the Evangelion design was created" and "The story of the birth of Evangelion ANIMA", is a must-read for EVA fans.

Evangelion ANIMA color illustrations
Evangelion ANIMA monochrome settings
Neon Genesis Evangelion color illustrations
Original anime Iconic Field color illustrations and settings
Exclusive long interview with Ikuto Yamashita

Table of Contents

Evangelion ANIMA COLOR 004
Long Interview with Ikuto Yamashita 01 100
Evangelion ANIMA 4 COMIC 102
Evangelion ANIMA MONOCHROME 112
Neon Genesis Evangelion ANOTHER 134
Long Interview with Ikuto Yamashita 02 144
Original Anime "Iconic Field" 146
Afterword' 160

Staff
